payment_method.name: Payment Method
payment_method.description: The method of payment (e.g., cash, check, credit card).

actions.name: Create Vendor

billing_address.description: The billing address of the vendor.

actions.name: Create Invoice
actions.description: Creates a new sales invoice.

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: The ID of the contact to invoice.

line_items.name: Line Items
line_items.description: An array of line items, each including description, quantity, unit amount, and account code.

due_date.name: Due Date
due_date.description: The due date for the invoice.

status.name: Status
status.description: The status of the invoice (e.g., DRAFT, SUBMITTED, AUTHORISED).

reference.name: Reference
reference.description: Additional reference number for the invoice.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Adds a new contact.

name.name: Name
name.description: The name of the contact.

email_address.name: Email Address
email_address.description: The email address of the contact.

phone_number.name: Phone Number
phone_number.description: The phone number of the contact.

address.name: Address
address.description: The address details of the contact.

actions.name: Create Bill
actions.description: Records a new bill (accounts payable).

line_items.name: Line Items
line_items.description: An array of line items, each including description, quantity, unit amount, and account code.

due_date.name: Due Date
due_date.description: The due date for the bill.

status.name: Status
status.description: The status of the bill (e.g., DRAFT, SUBMITTED, AUTHORISED).

reference.name: Reference
reference.description: Additional reference number for the bill.

actions.description: Records a payment for an invoice or bill.

invoice_id.name: Invoice ID
invoice_id.description: The ID of the invoice or bill being paid.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The ID of the bank account the payment is made from.

date.description: The date the payment was made.

actions.name: Create Bank Transaction
actions.description: Creates a new bank transaction.

type.name: Transaction Type
type.description: The type of bank transaction (e.g., RECEIVE, SPEND).

contact_id.name: Contact ID
contact_id.description: The ID of the contact associated with the transaction.

line_items.name: Line Items
line_items.description: An array of line items, each including description, quantity, unit amount, and account code.

bank_account_id.name: Bank Account ID
bank_account_id.description: The ID of the bank account for the transaction.

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Creates a new task within a specified list.

list_id.name: List ID
list_id.description: The ID of the list where the task will be created.

name.name: Task Name
name.description: The name of the task.

description.name: Description
description.description: A detailed description of the task.

assignees.name: Assignees
assignees.description: An array of user IDs to assign to the task.

status.name: Status
status.description: The status of the task (e.g., 'to do', 'in progress', 'done').

priority.name: Priority
priority.description: The priority level of the task: 1 (Urgent), 2 (High), 3 (Normal), 4 (Low).

due_date.name: Due Date
due_date.description: The due date and time for the task.

actions.name: Update Task
actions.description: Updates an existing task's details.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to update.

name.name: Task Name
name.description: The updated name of the task.

description.name: Description
description.description: The updated description of the task.

assignees.name: Assignees
assignees.description: An array of user IDs to assign to the task.

status.name: Status
status.description: The updated status of the task.

priority.name: Priority
priority.description: The updated priority level of the task.

due_date.name: Due Date
due_date.description: The updated due date and time for the task.

actions.name: Add Comment
actions.description: Adds a comment to a specified task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to comment on.

actions.name: Create List
actions.description: Creates a new list within a specified folder.

content.name: Content
content.description: Additional content or description for the list.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to add time tracking to.

start_time.description: The start time of the time entry.

end_time.name: End Time
end_time.description: The end time of the time entry.

description.name: Description
description.description: A description of the time entry.

actions.name: Create Ticket
actions.description: Creates a new support ticket.

email.name: Email
email.description: The email address of the requester.

description.name: Description
description.description: The detailed description of the issue.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: ID of the group to assign the ticket to.

responder_id.name: Responder ID
responder_id.description: ID of the agent to assign the ticket to.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to update.

status.description: New status code for the ticket.

priority.name: Priority
priority.description: New priority level for the ticket.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: ID of the new group to assign the ticket to.

responder_id.name: Responder ID
responder_id.description: ID of the new agent to assign the ticket to.

actions.description: Adds a note to an existing ticket.

ticket_id.name: Ticket ID
ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to add a note to.

private.description: Whether the note is private (true) or public (false).

actions.name: Assign Ticket
actions.description: Assigns a ticket to a specific agent or group.

ticket_id.name: Ticket ID
ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to assign.

responder_id.name: Responder ID
responder_id.description: ID of the agent to assign the ticket to.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: ID of the group to assign the ticket to.

actions.name: Close Ticket
actions.description: Closes an existing ticket.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to close.

actions.name: Create Spreadsheet
actions.description: Creates a new spreadsheet with a specified title.

actions.description: Adds a new sheet to an existing spreadsheet.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet to add the sheet to.

sheet_title.name: Sheet Title
sheet_title.description: The title of the new sheet.

actions.name: Append Row
actions.description: Appends a row of values to the end of a sheet.

range.name: Range
range.description: The A1 notation of a range to search for a logical table of data.

values.name: Values
values.description: An array of values to append as a new row.

actions.description: Updates a specific cell in a sheet.

range.name: Range
range.description: The A1 notation of the cell to update.

value.name: Value
value.description: The value to set in the specified cell.

actions.name: Read Range
actions.description: Reads values from a specified range in a sheet.

range.name: Range
range.description: The A1 notation of the range to read.

actions.description: Creates a new Excel workbook.

title.name: Title
title.description: The title of the new workbook.

actions.name: Add Worksheet
actions.description: Adds a new worksheet to an existing workbook.

sheet_name.name: Sheet Name
sheet_name.description: The name of the new worksheet.

actions.description: Inserts a new row into a worksheet.

row_index.name: Row Index
row_index.description: The index at which to insert the new row.

actions.description: Updates the value of a specific cell.

value.name: Value
value.description: The new value for the cell.

actions.name: Read Range

range.name: Range
range.description: The A1 notation of the range to read.

actions.description: Deletes a specific row from a worksheet.

row_index.description: The index of the row to delete.

actions.name: Create One-Off Event Type
actions.description: Creates a one-time event type for scheduling.

host.description: The URI of the user hosting the event.

name.name: Event Name
name.description: The name of the event.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Duration of the event in minutes.

date_setting.name: Date Setting
date_setting.description: Settings for the event's date and time.

actions.name: Create Single-Use Scheduling Link
actions.description: Generates a one-time scheduling link for an event type.

owner.name: Owner URI
owner.description: The URI of the user owning the event type.

max_event_count.name: Max Event Count
max_event_count.description: Maximum number of events that can be scheduled with this link.

event_type.name: Event Type URI
event_type.description: The URI of the event type.

actions.name: List Event Types
actions.description: Retrieves a list of event types for a user.

user.name: User URI
user.description: The URI of the user whose event types are to be listed.

actions.description: Retrieves available times for a specific event type.

event_type.name: Event Type URI
event_type.description: The URI of the event type.

start_time.name: Start Time
start_time.description: The start of the time range to check for availability.

end_time.name: End Time
end_time.description: The end of the time range to check for availability.

actions.name: List Scheduled Events
actions.description: Retrieves a list of scheduled events for a user.

user.name: User URI
user.description: The URI of the user whose scheduled events are to be listed.

actions.name: Create Envelope
actions.description: Creates a new envelope to send documents for signature.

email_subject.name: Email Subject
email_subject.description: The subject line of the email sent to recipients.

email_blurb.name: Email Blurb
email_blurb.description: The body of the email sent to recipients.

status.name: Status
status.description: The status of the envelope: 'created' (draft) or 'sent'.

documents.name: Documents
documents.description: An array of documents to include in the envelope, each with 'documentBase64', 'name', 'fileExtension', and 'documentId'.

recipients.name: Recipients
recipients.description: An object specifying the recipients, including 'signers', 'carbonCopies', etc.

actions.name: Add Recipient
actions.description: Adds a recipient to an existing envelope.

envelope_id.name: Envelope ID
envelope_id.description: The ID of the envelope to which the recipient will be added.

recipient.name: Recipient
recipient.description: An object specifying the recipient details, such as 'name', 'email', 'recipientId', and 'routingOrder'.

actions.name: Send Envelope
actions.description: Sends a draft envelope to the specified recipients.

envelope_id.name: Envelope ID
envelope_id.description: The ID of the envelope to send.

actions.name: Get Envelope Status
actions.description: Retrieves the current status of an envelope.

envelope_id.name: Envelope ID
envelope_id.description: The ID of the envelope whose status is to be retrieved.

actions.name: Download Document
actions.description: Downloads a specific document from an envelope.

envelope_id.name: Envelope ID
envelope_id.description: The ID of the envelope containing the document.

document_id.name: Document ID
document_id.description: The ID of the document to download.

actions.name: Create Customer
actions.description: Creates a new customer object to store information for recurring charges and subscriptions.

name.name: Name
name.description: The customer's full name.

description.name: Description
description.description: An arbitrary string attached to the customer for display purposes.

address.name: Address
address.description: The customer's address, including line1, city, state, postal_code, and country.

actions.name: Create Charge
actions.description: Creates a new charge object to collect payment from a customer.

amount.name: Amount
amount.description: Amount to charge in the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents).

customer.name: Customer ID
customer.description: The ID of an existing customer to charge.

source.name: Payment Source
source.description: A payment source to be charged, such as a card token or ID.

description.name: Description
description.description: An arbitrary string attached to the charge for display purposes.

actions.name: Create Subscription
actions.description: Creates a new subscription for a customer.

customer.name: Customer ID
customer.description: The ID of the customer to subscribe.

items.name: Subscription Items
items.description: An array of subscription items, each with a price ID and quantity.

trial_period_days.name: Trial Period Days
trial_period_days.description: Number of trial period days before the subscription starts.

default_payment_method.name: Default Payment Method
default_payment_method.description: ID of the default payment method for the subscription.

actions.name: Create Refund
actions.description: Initiates a refund for an existing charge.

charge.name: Charge ID
charge.description: The ID of the charge to refund.

amount.name: Amount
amount.description: Amount to refund in the smallest currency unit (optional).

actions.name: Create Payment Intent
actions.description: Creates a PaymentIntent object to initiate a payment flow.

amount.name: Amount
amount.description: Amount intended to be collected in the smallest currency unit.

customer.name: Customer ID
customer.description: The ID of an existing customer (optional).

payment_method.name: Payment Method ID
payment_method.description: ID of the payment method to attach to the PaymentIntent (optional).

confirm.name: Confirm
confirm.description: Whether to confirm the PaymentIntent immediately.

actions.description: Creates a new customer in the Shopify store.
